chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1010 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.01.2016 1. For Orders on MA 1238/16 2. For Orders on Office Objection 3. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Imtiaz Ali, Advocate for petitioner Ms. Aliya Sehar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Hameed Bajwa, Advocate for respondents Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. The petitioner is alleging harassment against respondent No.4/ SHO PS Khadro. Learned A.A.G. has filed comments of respondent No.4 who has denied the allegations. However, he is not present today. Learned A.A.G. submits that due protection of law would be extended to the petitioner and no harassment would be caused to him by any of the official respondents. In view of such statement, the counsel for petitioner seeks disposal of this petition. This petition is disposed of with strict direction to respondent No.4 not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and provide protection as per law. Learned A.A.G. undertakes to communicate this order to respondent Nos. 3 and 4 for compliance. JUDGE *Karar/-
